title: Adult social care priorities for local authorities
body: "The government has 3 objectives for adult social care. These are to:    radically improve the quality of care and support enable people to have more choice and control over their care and support strengthen the join-up between health and social care services   This publication:    sets out the government’s expectations for local authorities, from the 2026 to 2027 financial year onwards, to achieve these objectives and pave the way towards creating a national care service outlines the methodology that the Department of Health and Social Care will use to calculate new adult social care notional allocations for all local authorities over the next 3 years to support their budget-setting explains how the Department of Health and Social Care will draw on data and engagement with local authorities to understand how local progress is being made towards these expectations  "
